thisplot 0.3.8
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Return the first part of a colors object

Source: R/get_colors.R
head.colors.Rd

Returns the first part of a colors object, similar to head() for data frames.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'colors'
head(x, n = 6L, ...)

Arguments

x

A colors object (data frame with color information).

n

Number of rows to return. Default is 6.

...

Additional arguments passed to head().

Value

A colors object with the first n rows.

Examples

head(get_colors())
#> num  name        name_ch  rgb              hex      category  category_ch   
#> 1    shuilan     水蓝     (210, 240, 244)  #D2F0F4  blue      蓝            
#> 2    haitianlan  海天蓝   (198, 230, 232)  #C6E6E8  blue      蓝            
#> 3    hushuilan   湖水蓝   (176, 213, 223)  #B0D5DF  blue      蓝            
#> 4    yunmen      云门     (162, 210, 226)  #A2D2E2  blue      蓝            
#> 5    piaose      缥色     (133, 192, 219)  #85C0DB  blue      蓝            
#> 6    qiubolan    秋波蓝   (138, 188, 209)  #8ABCD1  blue      蓝            

head(get_colors(), n = 10)
#> num  name           name_ch   rgb              hex      category  category_ch   
#> 1    shuilan        水蓝      (210, 240, 244)  #D2F0F4  blue      蓝            
#> 2    haitianlan     海天蓝    (198, 230, 232)  #C6E6E8  blue      蓝            
#> 3    hushuilan      湖水蓝    (176, 213, 223)  #B0D5DF  blue      蓝            
#> 4    yunmen         云门      (162, 210, 226)  #A2D2E2  blue      蓝            
#> 5    piaose         缥色      (133, 192, 219)  #85C0DB  blue      蓝            
#> 6    qiubolan       秋波蓝    (138, 188, 209)  #8ABCD1  blue      蓝            
#> 7    qingshanlan    晴山蓝    (143, 178, 201)  #8FB2C9  blue      蓝            
#> 8    xinglan        星蓝      (147, 181, 207)  #93B5CF  blue      蓝            
#> 9    pinyue         品月      (138, 171, 204)  #8AABCC  blue      蓝            
#> 10   dongfangjibai  东方既白  (139, 163, 199)  #8BA3C7  blue      蓝
